name: Psanan

street_level_faction_presence.street_signals: Symbols, uniform cues, work marks, and rumor shorthand make power visible in daily movement.

greetings: Respect is shown through endurance, heat tolerance, and correct acknowledgment of House precedence.
hospitality_rules: Hosts offer shade, water, and forge-safe food first; comfort is proven through survival competence.
insult_triggers: carelessness in forge or descent zones
taboo_topics: speaking lightly of the dead in ashfall zones
class_expectations: matriarchs command, crafters endure, and laborers are expected to withstand heat and hierarchy without disorder
faith_etiquette: ancestral and civic renewal practices require seriousness, especially around memorial and rebuilding markers
suspicious_behavior: moving through descent gates without sanction
outsider_mistakes: reading harshness as simple cruelty rather than heat, danger, and precedent-driven rule

occupation_and_daily_life.daily_rhythm: Life turns on forging, ash cleanup, rebuilding, House service, harbor timing, and underworld risk management.
occupation_and_daily_life.work_rhythm_by_calendar_or_season: Volcanic cooling and ash periods sharply alter labor, travel, and public ritual.
occupation_and_daily_life.ordinary_texture: Ash, sulfur, heated metal, lamp smoke, dried spice, and wet stone dominate the air. Streets sound like hammers, shouted crews, braziers, and processional drums.

travel_and_transition_texture: Travel is shaped by ashfall, escorted descent chains, harbor windows, and visible threshold customs tied to danger.
dwelling_and_settlement_life: Homes differ by House rank but commonly include heat-managed courtyards, ash-control measures, household shrines, and multi-generational obligation spaces.
relationship_and_reputation_logic: People are remembered for endurance, oath-keeping, and whether they rebuild or merely benefit.
region_specific_emotional_tone: Psanan stories are severe, intimate, and ceremonial: volcanic danger, matriarchal pressure, rivalry under heat, and renewal earned through damage.
